creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 145757
patch to fix compilation of squid33 when cppunit is also installed

So now I have to do all the work myself, instead of being served a patch ;-)

AND it has turned out to be a maze of twisty little header files, all alike...

Here goes the patch. Enjoy.

-- Martin

p.s. I have not verified whether squid compiled with this patch also *works*. This is left as an exercise to the reader.
